description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND FS1 broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is in the USA
AND a user is authorized for FS1 MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the feed level fs1AuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the Postseason game with FS1 broadcasters is present in the Hero
steps.result:
THEN the MVPD pill does not display above the Hero title / game match up
AND MVPD text does not display below the Hero title / game match up
AND playback is initiated after selecting the "Watch Live" button
